purpose: Trigger-quality evaluation prompts for the coderabbit-pr-automation Agent Skill.
usage: Use these prompts to test whether the skill triggers on genuine CodeRabbit remediation workflow requests while avoiding false positives on adjacent GitHub Actions, generic code-review, and raw data-fetching tasks.

cases.query: Handle unresolved CodeRabbit PR review threads for this branch and keep the fixes bounded.
cases.why: Direct request for the bounded remediation workflow.

cases.query: Use this normalized CodeRabbit issue artifact to plan the fix pass and tell me whether the issues are actionable.
Interpret these CodeRabbit validation results and tell me whether a second remediation pass is justified.
cases.why: Direct adjudication request for validation output.

cases.query: Run the CodeRabbit remediation workflow on this PR without committing or pushing anything.
cases.why: Explicit request matching the conservative default workflow.

cases.query: I already extracted unresolved CodeRabbit issues into JSON. Can you prioritize them and define a bounded fix plan?
cases.why: Direct use of the normalized issue artifact and bounded planning.

cases.query: Summarize what happened in this CodeRabbit autofix run and what remains unresolved.
cases.why: Summary mode for the same workflow.

cases.query: Design a safe workflow for unresolved CodeRabbit review comments using an issue artifact, a fix pass, and a validation pass.
cases.why: Design-mode request clearly inside the skill boundary.

cases.query: Given these unresolved CodeRabbit findings, decide what is in scope to fix now and what should be deferred.
cases.why: Bounded triage and scope decision inside the workflow.

cases.query: Set up a self-hosted GitHub Actions runner on my server.
cases.why: Runner setup is intentionally out of scope.

cases.query: Write a GitHub Action that runs tests on every pull request.
cases.why: Generic CI authoring, not CodeRabbit remediation.

cases.query: Review this pull request for bugs, performance problems, and security issues.
cases.why: Generic PR review is adjacent but outside this skill's scope.

cases.query: Fetch raw GraphQL review-thread data for PR 123.
cases.why: Raw extraction alone is not the remediation workflow.

cases.query: Fix all warnings in this repository and clean up the code while you're there.
cases.why: Broad cleanup request violates the bounded workflow scope.

cases.query: Create a reusable GitHub automation framework for our engineering team.
cases.why: Too broad and not specific to CodeRabbit remediation.

cases.query: Push the current branch and reply to all CodeRabbit threads automatically.
cases.why: Default workflow explicitly avoids push and thread resolution.

cases.query: Help me write a Python parser for GitHub review threads.
cases.why: Implementation task adjacent to the workflow, but not the workflow itself.
